leadText: Mothim (Japanese: ガーメイル Gamale) is a dual-type Bug/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from a male Burmy starting at level 20. It is one of Burmy's final forms, the other being Wormadam.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Mothim is a moth -like Pokémon with two pairs of wings, one pair larger than the other is. The wings are primarily tan with an orange, oval marking on each. The tips of the wings split into small, orange squares; there are three on the larger pair and two on the smaller pair. Mothim spreads steel-colored scales whenever it flaps its wings. Mothim's head has orange semi-circular eyes with gray, orange-tipped antennae running along the edges before extending and widening at the top. Its body is black with a patch of orange on the underside and a gray stripe down its back. It also has four gray legs and a small black tail that splits into two squares. Mothim is a nomadic, nocturnal Pokémon that always remains on the move, searching for flower honey and nectar. It has often been seen traveling in fields and mountains. Despite its diet, Mothim is never seen near any flower gardens. This is because, instead of gathering honey on its own, Mothim raids the hives of Combee for honey. It is a male-only species, with Wormadam as its female counterpart. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Mothim evolves from male Burmy and is one of the final forms of the species, the other being Wormadam . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Burmy Any Cloak Bug Male → First Evolution Mothim Bug Flying

It flies over fields and mountains in constant search of floral honey. Platinum While it loves floral honey, it won't gather any itself. Instead, it plots to steal some from Combee . HeartGold It flutters around at night and steals honey from the Combee hive. SoulSilver Generation V Unova #— Black While it loves floral honey, it won't gather any itself. Pokémon GO Base HP: 172 Base Attack: 185 Base Defense: 98 Egg Distance: N/A Buddy Distance: 1 km Evolution Requirement: N/A Fast Attacks: Air Slash , Bug Bite Charged Attacks: Psybeam , Aerial Ace , Bug Buzz Form data [ edit | edit source ] Despite not having any form differences, Mothim technically has three forms based on the cloak of Burmy it evolves from, though this is only shown in its internal data. However, a Mothim from Pokémon GO will always be in the Plant Cloak form if evolved from a Burmy whilst still in GO. The Trash and Sandy Cloak forms of Mothim can still be obtained by transferring Burmy to Pokémon Legends: Arceus first and then evolving there. sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry DP030 Mothim Ash's Pokédex Mothim, the Moth Pokémon, and the evolved form of a male Burmy . It has no particular habitat, but instead flies across the land, searching for its favorite nectar.
